utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , I got that . I will escape over there . I will come back over here . All right , come on Ms . Pac ... Man . It’s got ... Right ...

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey , you guys . Listen , I am sorry that I was hogging the game before ... Oh my God ! Your friends have some unfortunate initials !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Chandler sucks ! He could not have gotten this good !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I did . But it came at a price .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: But Ben is coming over tonight and he can not see this .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh come on , by age seven kids have already seen orgies . Was it just me ? !
